'''yazhosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobbing|jobbing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-zh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobbing|jobbing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yazhosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæzhesheth|yæzhesheth]] || [[word:yæzheshej|yæzheshej]] || [[word:yæzheshesh|yæzheshesh]] || [[word:yæzheshe|yæzheshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazhozhoshoth|yazhozhoshoth]] || [[word:yazhozhoshoj|yazhozhoshoj]] || [[word:yazhozhoshosh|yazhozhoshosh]] || [[word:yazhozhosho|yazhozhosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazhoshoth|yazhoshoth]] || [[word:yazhoshoj|yazhoshoj]] || [[word:yazhoshosh|yazhoshosh]] || [[word:yazhosho|yazhosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazhofshoth|yazhofshoth]] || [[word:yazhofshoj|yazhofshoj]] || [[word:yazhofshosh|yazhofshosh]] || [[word:yazhofshof|yazhofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yazhoshotho|yazhoshotho]] || [[word:yazhoshojo|yazhoshojo]] || [[word:yazhoshosho|yazhoshosho]] || [[word:yazhoshoko|yazhoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yazhoshoth|yazhoshoth]] || [[word:yazhoshoj|yazhoshoj]] || [[word:yazhoshosh|yazhoshosh]] || [[word:yazhosho|yazhosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yazhoshothol|yazhoshothol]] || [[word:yazhoshojol|yazhoshojol]] || [[word:yazhoshoshol|yazhoshoshol]] || [[word:yazhoshokol|yazhoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yazhoshothotho|yazhoshothotho]] || [[word:yazhoshojojo|yazhoshojojo]] || [[word:yazhoshoshosho|yazhoshoshosho]] || [[word:yazhoshoko|yazhoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yazhoshothon|yazhoshothon]] || [[word:yazhoshojon|yazhoshojon]] || [[word:yazhoshoshon|yazhoshoshon]] || [[word:yazhoshokon|yazhoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yazhoshothoro|yazhoshothoro]] || [[word:yazhoshojoro|yazhoshojoro]] || [[word:yazhoshoshoro|yazhoshoshoro]] || [[word:yazhoshokoro|yazhoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
